label: Hit counter
summary: The odometer visitor counter: static, local, or api-backed.
era: The CGI counter that proved your page had visitors, in a pre-analytics world.

classes.name: rs-counter
classes.role: the odometer shell the widget renders into

options.name: src
options.note: for api mode; POST returns { count }

options.name: digits
options.note: zero-pad width; the label line is your own rs-counter__label markup

a11y: Announced once to a screen reader as ordinary text, never on a tick. The api contract counts hits, never people, no identifiers stored (Decency Law).
